copypastas.text: Check out the iBUYPOWER PC and Hyte towers to support NA CS! https://ibp.gg/fl0m https://hyte.co/fl0m

LIZARD Hi fl0m- It’s me, your only Gooner. For Months I have worked and it has created the illusion that you are streaming to a large set of gooners. But here’s the truth: all these goobers in the chat are me. And now, for you to be convinced of this, I will send this message from all my gooning accounts. LIZARD

After a good game in csgo, i added fl0m because he seemed like a cool guy. We got chatting, over the next couple of months we became good friends. Lots of banter, lots of great CS and most importantly true friendship. I invited him to my house for a csgo lan party. He said he was coming so i was looking forward to meeting him in real life. When he arrived at my house, he pushed me against the wall and started nibbling my ear. Turns out he was vegan. Don't trust this guy.
Fl0m is the type of guy to question you on you'r food choices. But be the First one to eat your leftovers you had in the fridge and not feel sorry about it.

But why the quiet when the meat is riot? He be the wide of the slide. The mythic glute is the flute of the shoot. ASS GO CLAP. HE IS THE BOOTY. THE LAN OF THE CAKE. DUMMY CRUSH THE SERVER.
